---
title: Arcs layer (deck.gl)
---

The `arcs_deck` layer displays curved or straight arc lines between two arbitrary taxa. It is powered by [deck.gl](https://deck.gl).

```{python}
import polars as pl
from pylifemap import Lifemap
d = pl.DataFrame(
    {
        "taxid": [
            9685,
            9615,
            9994,
            2467430,
            2514524,
            2038938,
            1021470,
            1415565,
            1928562,
            1397240,
            230741,
        ],
        "dest_taxid": [
            9615,
            1415565,
            2467430,
            9994,
            9685,
            2514524,
            2038938,
            1397240,
            1021470,
            1928562,
            230741,
        ],
    }
)
Lifemap(d).layer_arcs_deck(
    taxid_dest_col="dest_taxid"
).show()

```

For a detailed list of `layer_arcs_deck` arguments you can take a look at its [documentation](`~pylifemap.Lifemap.layer_arcs_deck`).

For an alternative arcs visualization, see [layer_arcs_deck](layer_arcs.qmd).
